scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd server && npm start" "cd client && npm run preview"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.test:unit: cd server && npm test && cd ..\client && npm test
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:unit
